item.name: Authentic Starlight Donuts
item.description:
Festive treats for those who prefer to express their Starlight spirit through eating until they lose consciousness. While one may be forgiven for mistaking these for leftovers from a previous year, that could not be further from the truth, according to their baker.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Piety Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +2
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
